title: Peeg
description: A simple mod that was originally for other things, but ended up being devoted to a singular mob: the Peeg. there are variants of it, including angry and radioactive. The latest version is in heavy alpha.
body:
(Also known as maincraeft.)
Hello folks!

I'd like to introduce you to my silly lil idea.

After getting motivation to post this silly mod..

I decided to anyway! (even though it's a bit low quality)

I'm glad you're reading this. Ahem, back to the mod itself...

This mod adds the Peeg.

The Peeg has some variants, including Angry Peeg and Radioactive Peeg.

This is sort of a **joke mod,** although it took a serious turn after awhile.

The Peeg is a silly lil fella you can ride, however he's not bright enough to climb up blocks through riding.

# Angry Peeg

Oh boy..

The Angry Peeg is basically the boss fight of this mod, and he can only be seen through rare natural spawning.

If you hit him, he will aggro, and you do NOT want him to aggro at you.

He has stupidly large HP, and can kill you without armor in around.. Hmmm... 3 hits I'd suppose?

Don't. And I mean **DON'T** aggro him.

# Radioactive Peeg.

Basically living TNT.

He makes sounds similar to a geiger counter, and goes flying on touch.

He (would be)/is created through 8 uranium rods and one peeg spawn egg in the center.

# Generic Peeg

The classic.

He's just pink, with a doodled smile and tail.

Unlike his brothers (aka variants), he can be ridden!

He's also the main part of this entire mod.

He has a whole dimension called the Peegworld!

# The Peegworld

Full of the default Peeg's face. Considering adding a peeg golem to it...

This is also canonically where the Peegs come from.

# Silly Facts

It is pronounced pēg.

This mod adds a cross, which can be used to instantly break blocks.

# End of description

That's mostly it!

I hope you enjoy this silly lil' mod.
